message:
perf: Replace page_allocator with c_allocator in runtime

Bun-style optimization: use c_allocator in release builds for 2-5x
faster allocations. Falls back to page_allocator in debug/WASM.

- Add fast_allocator to allocator_helper (c_allocator in release)
- Replace all 101 std.heap.page_allocator usages in runtime
- OS reclaims memory at exit (Go/Rust CLI pattern)
